commit_scope: Add a live public API rendezvous nonce-hash receipt script and update the public rendezvous floor evidence.

commands: coord claim public-api-rendezvous-receipt "Next carrier proof after PR #3192: add bounded live public API rendezvous nonce receipt using existing public/API surfaces; avoid audio capture, Pastebin/archive posting, APK/JNI, BML compiler, and live-cycle runtime lanes."
local_validation.notes: The live script posted a nonce hash to https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/runtime/events and read it back from GET /api/runtime/events without auth. Receipt event_id=rt_13fdae655ee1, nonce_hash_len=64, write_ms=139, read_ms=3876, ttl_ms=600000, public_readable=1, raw_nonce_retained=0, status=pass. The raw nonce stayed local in .cache and is not committed.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: The proof used the already deployed public API at https://api.coherencycoin.com.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A public rendezvous nonce hash can be written to the public API and read back from the public runtime event window as a bounded receipt.
test_flows: Generate a local nonce and SHA-256 nonce hash.
Post only the nonce hash and bounded metadata to the public runtime event route.
Read the public runtime event window and match rendezvous_id plus nonce_hash.
Write a local receipt JSON with write/read timing, status, and public readability.

phase_gate.gate: The public API carrier must write and read back a nonce-hash rendezvous cell without retaining the raw nonce.
phase_gate.next: Add live audio chirp detection or paste/archive fallback carriers using the same Form receipt shape.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: The public-audio-rendezvous floor validated the receipt shape but did not claim a live public API write/read proof.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: The public API carrier has a live nonce-hash write/read receipt through existing runtime events, with public readability and no raw nonce retention.
